chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA C.P.No.S-254 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections at flag "A". 2. For hearing of main case. ------ 15.09.2025 Mr. Ahmed Ali Boohar, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Athar Ali, Advocate for the Respondents. Mr. Munwar Ali Abbasi, Assistant Advocate General, Sindh. Mr. Sardar Ali, Deputy Prosecutor General, Sindh a/w SIP Ghulam Asghar, S.H.O. P.S. Market, S.I.P Gulzar Ali, S.H.O. P.S. Darri and SIP Ali Dost. ------ Comments filed on behalf of the official respondents are taken on record. Mr. Athar Ali, Advocate files vakalatnama on behalf of the private respondents, also taken on record. The private respondents are also present in person. Learned counsel for the petitioner when confronted that the matter pertains to the registration of a society under the name and style of “Sarafa Jewellers Association, Larkana” and for that particular purpose, the forum under the Societies Registration, Act, 1860 was available; therefore, he submits that he will avail the remedy available to him before the said forum. Since the petitioner has alleged that S.H.Os Police Stations Market and Darri are harassing him, therefore, they are directed to conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law. Petition stands disposed of in the above terms. Judge Manzoor
